description: puma, a brand of German origin, is known for its high-end athletic footwear with simplistic designs. These blue floaters from puma stick to the brand's belief in minimalism. These are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style. You can team this pair with jeans and tees for a great casual look. Upper Canvas upper with foam padded lining for snug Fit Superior lining of foam on heel straps to prevent blisters Velcro straps for easy movement Soft footbed with ergonomical fit and massage nubs for utmost comfort Perforations on the upper for breathability Branding on the straps Midsole Shock-absorbing lightweight phylon midsole for added comfort Outsole Multi-directional rubber lugs in V-shaped pattern for firm grip on uneven terrain 3D brand logo at the centre Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
